path.style: fill: none; stroke: var(--foreground); stroke-width: 3px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;
fill: none; stroke: var(--foreground); stroke-width: 3px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;

text.style: fill: none; stroke: var(--foreground); stroke-width: 3px; font-family: monospace; font-size: 24px; white-space: pre;
